LanguageData.TW_Mech_Praetor.label: Praetor
LanguageData.TW_Mech_Praetor.description: Elite mechanoid unit featuring enhanced shield generators and quad-tube missile launchers. Capable of launching precision HE/EMP warheads at extended ranges while neutralizing cloaking effects within operational radius through advanced counter-detection systems.
LanguageData.TW_Mech_Praetor.tools.head.label: head
